            {
              "id": "PROP-0036",
              "text": "During state sync, the memory consumption of processing trie nodes received from peers must be bounded. Branch nodes with all 16 children populated must not cause unbounded memory allocation or stack overflow in recursive processing.",

            },
            {
              "id": "PROP-0037",
              "text": "The encode_node function (SG-002) must handle all valid Fusaka/Osaka types explicitly. The type dispatch (isinstance checks) must be exhaustive for all types that can appear in the Osaka state trie. No Osaka-specific type may reach the previous_trie.encode_node fallback.",
              "type": "invariant",

              },

              "bug_bounty_eligible": true,

            },
            {
              "id": "PROP-0038",
              "text": "The trie_set function must use type-safe equality comparison when checking value == trie.default. No type coercion or implicit conversion may cause a non-default value to compare equal to the default value.",

              },

              "bug_bounty_eligible": true,

            },
            {
              "id": "PROP-0039",
              "text": "The encode_node function (SG-002) must produce non-empty output for all valid trie values. For all values V in a valid state: encode_node(V, storage_root) != b''.",

              "id": "PROP-0040",
              "text": "The trie_set function must preserve the invariant that all keys in trie._data map to non-default values. After any call to trie_set: forall K in trie._data: trie._data[K] != trie.default.",

            {
              "id": "PROP-0041",
              "text": "For all values V encoded by encode_node (SG-002): the isinstance type dispatch must be correctly ordered such that subclass relationships do not cause misrouting. Specifically, if any type is a subclass of another checked type, the more specific check must come first.",

The is_leaf flag encoded in the first byte must be preserved exactly through encode-decode round trips.",

              "text": "The root_node returned by encode_internal_node(patricialize(obj, Uint(0))) must be of type Bytes (a keccak256 hash) when its RLP encoding is >= 32 bytes. The Root() constructor must only receive 32-byte hash values in this case.",

            {

              "text": "The get_storage_root callback must return deterministic results: for any given Account with address A, calling get_storage_root(A) must always return the same Root value for the same underlying storage state, regardless of when or how many times it is called.",

              "id": "PROP-0047",
              "text": "The shallow copy in copy_trie (SG-003) must be safe against aliasing: all value objects in the trie must be immutable/frozen. If any mutable value is stored, modifications through the copy must not affect the original trie or vice versa.",

              "bug_bounty_eligible": true,

            {

              "text": "For the Osaka fork encode_account function invoked by encode_node (SG-002): the account encoding must include nonce, balance, storage_root, and code_hash in the correct order per the Osaka specification. The encoding must be identical across all client implementations.",

            {
              "id": "PROP-0049",
              "text": "The nibble_list_to_compact function must handle empty nibble lists correctly: nibble_list_to_compact([], is_leaf) must produce a single byte encoding the is_leaf flag with even parity (0x00 for extension, 0x20 for leaf).",

},
      "test_procedure": "1. Test gas cap for type 0 (legacy) - verify enforcement.\n2. Test gas cap for type 1 (EIP-2930) - verify enforcement.\n3. Test gas cap for type 2 (EIP-1559) - verify enforcement.\n4. Test gas cap for type 3 (EIP-4844 blob) - verify enforcement.\n5. Verify no transaction type bypasses the cap.",
      "bug_class": "Input Validation",
      "risk_category": "Tampering",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0010 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-003"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0011-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0011",
      "title": "Does multiplication_complexity always return >= 16 (EIP-7883)?",
      "severity": "High",
      "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with base_length=0, modulus_length=0.\n2. Test with various small length combinations.\n3. Verify minimum output is always 16.\n4. Attempt to find inputs producing complexity < 16.\n5. Test boundary values around the 32-byte threshold.",
      "bug_class": "Input Validation",
      "risk_category": "Denial of Service",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0011 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0012-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0012",
      "title": "Is multiplication_complexity exactly 16 when max_length <= 32?",
      "severity": "High",
      "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with max(base_length, modulus_length) = 1.\n2. Test with max(base_length, modulus_length) = 32.\n3. Verify all return exactly 16.\n4. Test boundary at max_length = 33 - verify different formula.\n5. Confirm branching is correct at threshold.",
      "bug_class": "Input Validation",
      "risk_category": "Tampering",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0012 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0013-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0013",
      "title": "Is ceiling division used in multiplication_complexity for max_length > 32?",
      "severity": "Critical",
      "mindset": "Formal Verification Engineer",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with max_length = 33 (not multiple of 8).\n2. Verify complexity = 2 * ceil(33/8)^2 = 2 * 5^2 = 50.\n3. Test with max_length = 40 (multiple of 8).\n4. Test with various non-multiple-of-8 values.\n5. Cross-check across client implementations.",
      "bug_class": "State Consistency",
      "risk_category": "Tampering",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0013 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0014-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0014",
      "title": "Does iteration_count have minimum floor of 1?",
      "severity": "High",
      "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with exponent = 0 (should produce iteration_count = 1).\n2. Test with exponent_length = 0.\n3. Verify max(iteration_count, 1) clamp is applied.\n4. Attempt to find inputs producing iteration_count = 0.\n5. Verify no zero-cost execution paths exist.",
      "bug_class": "Input Validation",
      "risk_category": "Denial of Service",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0014 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0015-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0015",
      "title": "Is iteration_count = 1 for exponent == 0 with exponent_length <= 32?",
      "severity": "Medium",
      "mindset": "Formal Verification Engineer",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with exponent = 0, exponent_length = 1.\n2. Test with exponent = 0, exponent_length = 32.\n3. Verify iteration_count = 1 in both cases.\n4. Verify correct branching for zero exponent.\n5. Test boundary at exponent_length = 33.",
      "bug_class": "Input Validation",
      "risk_category": "Tampering",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0015 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0016-001",
      "property_id": "PROP-0016",
      "title": "Is multiplier 16 (not 8) used for large exponent iteration_count?",
      "severity": "Critical",
      "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
      "is_boundary_check": true,
      "reachability": {
        "classification": "external-reachable",
        "entry_points": ["Transaction"],
        "attacker_controlled": true,
        "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
      },
      "test_procedure": "1. Test with exponent_length = 33.\n2. Calculate expected iteration_count with multiplier 16.\n3. Verify client produces this value.\n4. Compare against EIP-2565 formula (multiplier 8) - should differ.\n5. Cross-check across all client implementations.",
      "bug_class": "State Consistency",
      "risk_category": "Tampering",
      "notes": "Source: PROP-0016 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
    },
    {
